title: Vanity: Aesthetic Armory
description: Greatly expands the user's armory by providing new weapon, tool and armor skins for your favorite items.
body:
# Vanity: Aesthetic Armory
An Addon which adds multiple new shapes for your tools, following each tool tier.
By adding multiple tool skins unlocked by default, and three Designs that can be bought from Villagers, this Mod will allow your arsenal to be the most diverse and personalized it's ever been!

This pack's tool colors are from my resource pack, [Farcr's Re-Crafted](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/farcrs-re-crafted). If you like the look of these weapons, be sure to download that pack too!

The three Designs, which can all be bought from Villagers, are:
## Blacksmithing Design
A Design for your classic, heavy war weapons, allowing you to turn your tools into:
- Claymore
- Battle Axe
- War Axe
  
## Fine Swordsmithing Design
A Design for your fine Katanas, Tachis and similar weaponry, allowing you to turn your tools into:
- Katana
- Nodachi
- Wakizashi

## Polearm Design
A Design for your Polearms, for those who'd rather keep a distance and use practical and elegant weaponry, allowing you to turn your tools into:
- Halberd
- Flamberge

## Default Design
Alongside the aforementioned Designs, some item skins will be unlocked by default, without requiring the use of a Design:
- Longsword
- Shortsword
- Dagger
- Hunter Axe

Fan of my work? Join [My Discord](https://discord.gg/JW4utPut9x), to keep up with new project, project updates, or simply talk with a small, homely community
